title: castilleja pumila
intro: Castilleja pumila, also known as short-stemmed Indian paintbrush or dwarf Indian paintbrush, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This perennial herb has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Castilleja pumila include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Castilleja pumila can be prepared as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
